PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Bosshard for Geraldean Minor.

The Court stated that additional supplements had been provided today and that the matter now seems to be in order. Mr. Bosshard will file the declarations regarding efforts to locate Heirs and authenticity of the will. The matter was taken under submission. Mr. Bosshard stated that powers of full authority were requested in the petition but that they were not reflected in the publication.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
